# BP-134 variant negative: Take handles ErrRecordNotFound explicitly.
lang: go
file: BP-134-variant-safe.go
variant: gorm-take-not-found
---
package sample

import (
	"errors"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct{}

func takeUser(db *gorm.DB, user *User) error {
	if err := db.Take(user).Error; errors.Is(err, gorm.ErrRecordNotFound) {
		return nil
	}
	return nil
}
